surface_verification.justification: Shared-infra logic change (triage.mark_status idle-main routing) — no startable app surface. The touches_io_boundary write-routing is empirically pinned by shared/tests/test_triage_outbox.py with a real git-repo+origin fixture; full triage+sweep suite + CI=true rerun green.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 idle main (origin + default branch): a status flip on a TRACKED-resident item routes to the OUTBOX, tracked log byte-unchanged, union resolves dismissed
behaviors.evidence: test_triage_outbox.py::test_mark_status_idle_main_tracked_item_routes_to_outbox PASSED (git_repo+origin fixture; asserts should_route_to_outbox True precondition)

behaviors.behavior: AC2 iterate/* branch (worktree, not idle main): a tracked-item status flip stays in TRACKED (ships in PR) — idle-main routing does not leak into the worktree path
behaviors.evidence: test_triage_outbox.py::test_mark_status_iterate_branch_tracked_item_stays_tracked PASSED (asserts should_route_to_outbox False on iterate/* branch)

behaviors.behavior: AC3 residence preserved off the idle-main path: outbox-only id -> outbox (no orphan/resurrect); tracked+outbox overlap -> tracked; no-origin/non-git -> tracked; mark_status takes no to_outbox param
behaviors.evidence: test_triage_outbox.py residence suite green: test_mark_status_residence_outbox_no_tracked_orphan, _residence_tracked_preferred_on_overlap, _has_no_to_outbox_param, test_should_route_* (no-origin/iterate/non-git False) — all PASSED, unchanged by the fix

behaviors.behavior: AC4 no regression across every mark_status consumer (producers compliance/drift/phase-quality/f0.5, sweep, gc, cli, storage, schema, promote)
behaviors.evidence: full shared/tests suite 3131 passed (not slow/cross_plugin) + CI=true rerun of triage/sweep/producer subset 126 passed + targeted mark_status-consumer set 251 passed
